title: Claude Code - API Performance
description: API and model performance: latency percentiles, throughput, speed modes, cache effects, errors

links.title: Overview
links.tooltip: Executive summary with Prometheus + Athena highlights

links.title: Real-Time Metrics (Prometheus)
links.tooltip: Live cost rates, token rates, session activity

list.name: model
list.label: Model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name IN ('claude_code.api_request', 'claude_code.api_error') AND model IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY model

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_id FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE team_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY team_id

list.name: user
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY user_display

panels.title: Avg Latency
panels.description: Average API request latency. Green < 2s, Yellow 2-5s, Red > 5s.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 2) AS avg_latency_sec FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%')

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of API calls that resulted in errors. Green < 1%, Yellow 1-5%, Red > 5%.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name IN ('claude_code.api_request', 'claude_code.api_error') AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_api_calls FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(output_tokens), 0) AS avg_output_tokens FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%')

panels.title: API Latency Percentiles (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: Latency distribution over time with 5s SLA threshold line.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.50) / 1000.0, 2) AS p50_seconds, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.90) / 1000.0, 2) AS p90_seconds, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.99) / 1000.0, 2) AS p99_seconds FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Throughput by Model
panels.description: Hourly API call volume by model.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, model, COUNT(*) AS api_calls FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1, model ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Latency by Model (p50/p90/p99)
panels.description: Per-model latency breakdown with filterable columns.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.50), 0) AS p50_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.90), 0) AS p90_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.99), 0) AS p99_ms, ROUND(CAST(SUM(input_tokens) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(SUM(output_tokens) AS DOUBLE), 0), 2) AS io_ratio, SUM(output_tokens) AS total_output_tokens FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_requests DESC

panels.title: Speed Mode Performance
panels.description: Latency and throughput by speed mode per model.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT COALESCE(speed, 'unknown') AS speed_mode, model, COUNT(*) AS api_calls, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.50), 0) AS p50_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.90), 0) AS p90_ms, ROUND(AVG(output_tokens), 0) AS avg_output_tokens, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY COALESCE(speed, 'unknown'), model ORDER BY api_calls DESC

panels.title: Latency vs Throughput Correlation
panels.description: Overlay latency trend with throughput to identify load-latency correlation.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.50) / 1000.0, 2) AS p50_latency_sec, ROUND(approx_percentile(duration_ms, 0.90) / 1000.0, 2) AS p90_latency_sec, COUNT(*) AS api_calls_per_hour FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cache Effect on Performance
panels.description: How cache tokens affect latency and cost by model.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT model, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0) > 0 THEN 'cache_hit' ELSE 'no_cache' END AS cache_status, COUNT(*) AS api_calls, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_ms, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost, ROUND(AVG(input_tokens), 0) AS avg_input_tokens, ROUND(AVG(output_tokens), 0) AS avg_output_tokens, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)), 0) AS avg_cache_read_tokens FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY model, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0) > 0 THEN 'cache_hit' ELSE 'no_cache' END ORDER BY model, cache_status

SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS error_count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_error' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY model ORDER BY error_count DESC

panels.title: Error Trend
panels.description: Hourly error count with threshold indicator.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, COUNT(*) AS errors FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_error' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Recent API Errors
panels.description: Latest 100 API errors with status codes, model, and error details.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT "timestamp", model, status_code, error, COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display, session_id, ROUND(duration_ms, 0) AS duration_ms, attempt FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_error' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 100
